basicInfo.name: Nightmare Snipper
basicInfo.flavor: Snipper finally managed to hunt down Kai, the infamous Saber Tiger. This lead to all of other hunters addressing Snipper as the Legendary Hunter.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Wild Shot
Skill 1.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 1500% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Burn. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 1500% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Death Sentence
Skill 2.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Consumes 4 stack(s) of [Hunter's Expertise] to deal additional damage equal to 20% of the target's Max HP. [Limit: 750% of Snipper's Attack]
 - Deals damage equal to 1500% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 1500% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Hunter's Expertise
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants 1 stack(s) of Hunter's Expertise when 1 enemy falls in battle. [Max 4 Stack(s)]

profile.story:
Snipper is a raccoon beastkin.
He was born in a village of hunters in the Blizzard Plains, but everyone in his town, including his parents, was killed when the Saber Tigers attacked.
As the sole survivor of the incident, he wandered from town to town, learning how to hunt, and surviving on the hope that one day he would get his revenge on Kai, the Saber Tiger who murdered his parents.
Despite living a revenge-fueled life, he holds a rather optimistic attitude, and his stoic nature often doesn't let his underlying anger come through.
He hates people who try to cheat or bend rules and is incredibly independent — he didn't even tell his traveling companions about his plans for revenge.
He's very short and looks rather childish, but he conducts himself like someone much older.
